entries.label: Was this inspection conducted during a period of rainfall and stormwater runoff?

PPC and Site Map:  Have a copy of the PPC and site map with you during the inspection so that you can ensure they are current and accurate.  Use it as an aide in recording the location of any issues you identify during the inspection
Is the Site Map current and accurate?
Is the SPPC inventory of activities, materials and products current?
Was documentation of training located in the SWPPP?
Are there any new potential pollutant sources to be added to the map and reflected in the SWPPP?
Were any spills, leaks, or evidence of leaks (sheens) observed during this inspection?
Please notify Kayla Jones by phone at 412-332-2884 or by email at kjones@apexcos.com immediately.
Did you notify the Site Contact, General Facility Manager, or Maintenance Lead of any corrective actions resulting from this inspection?

entry_values.text: No, unable to notify site personnel

conditions.value: No, unable to notify site personnel

entries.label: Please notify Kayla Jones by phone at 412-332-2884 or by email at kjones@apexcos.com by the end of the day of the inspection.

conditions.value: No, unable to notify site personnel

entries.label:
II. CORRECTIVE ACTION AND SPPP MODIFICATIONS DESCRIPTIONS: Additional space to describe inspection findings
and corrective actions if needed. Provide brief explanation of the general location and the rationale for the additional or different BMPs.

Site Inspector.  This section must be completed by the person who conducted the site inspection prior to submitting this form to the person with signature authority or a duly authorized representative of that person.
Is this facility in compliance with the terms and conditions of the PPC and the Industrial Stormwater General Permit?
This report includes the remedial actions that must be take to meet the requirements of the PPC and permit, including a schedule of implementation of the remedial actions.
